primary_function: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill.

authoritative: PDF merging and splitting with pypdf
Text extraction with pypdf and pdfplumber

suggested_aec_gates: Verify code examples use proper Python syntax and imports
Confirm pypdf library usage follows current API patterns
Ensure Unicode subscript/superscript warnings are included for reportlab
Validate command-line examples include proper flag syntax
Check that responses differentiate between pypdf, pdfplumber, and reportlab use cases
Verify responses redirect PDF form filling to FORMS.md
Confirm advanced features are properly delegated to REFERENCE.md
Ensure error handling is included in code examples where appropriate
trigger_text: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill.
